description: Art. 5(1)(c) — Social scoring of natural persons over time, across multiple unrelated contexts, leading to detrimental or unfavourable treatment disproportionate to the original data. Per Feb 2025 Commission guidelines: requires (i) over time, (ii) across multiple unrelated contexts, (iii) detrimental treatment disproportionate to the data. Single-context creditworthiness assessment is NOT prohibited.
